title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, July 26 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 16/07/2022
Image reference: 2022-07-16_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-july-26-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Handysize values have softened
Handy BC Nord Montreal (36,600 DWT, Jun 2012, Onomichi Dockyard) sold to unknown Greek buyers for USD 22.00 mil, VV Value USD 21.89 mil - SS Passed. Handy BC (Open Hatch) Althea (25,000 DWT, Mar 1999, Imabari) sold to unknown Turkish buyers for USD 8.10 mil, VV Value USD 7.62 mil - DD Due. Tankers: Tanker values have firmed
Suezmax Dolviken (158,500 DWT, Jan 2012, Samsung) sold to Advantage Tankers for USD 42.50 mil, VV Value USD 40.18 mil - SS Passed.
